title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Mothercare India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Mothercare India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mothercare India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Mothercare India:
Mothercare India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mothercare India!
